allow: Bash(node --experimental-sqlite -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {getDb}=require\('./src/db'\); const db=getDb\(\); console.log\('period_id in transactions:', db.prepare\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\(transactions\)\\"\).all\(\).map\(c=>c.name\).includes\('period_id'\)\); console.log\('period_id in credit_card_transactions:', db.prepare\(\\"PRAGMA table_info\(credit_card_transactions\)\\"\).all\(\).map\(c=>c.name\).includes\('period_id'\)\);")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"{x['category']:15} {x['amount']:>8} \({x['percentage']}%\)\\"\) for x in d['data']]; print\(f\\"\\nperiod={d['period']}  total categories={len\(d['data']\)}\\"\)")
Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('categories:', d.data.length, '| top:', d.data[0]?.category, d.data[0]?.amount\)")
